prestazioni: Replace the original Ford 289 HiPo (K-code) block with a Roush-Yates CNC-ported aluminum cylinder head (part #RY-289-ALU) featuring 2.02" intake/1.60" exhaust valves, 64cc combustion chambers, and a 10.5:1 compression ratio for optimized airflow and power output up to 450 HP on 100-octane fuel with a Holley Sniper EFI (PN 550-511) standalone ECU.

Install a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission (PN TKO-600-1) with a McLeod twin-disc clutch (PN 691002) and a Ford 9" rear end housing a Detroit Locker differential (PN 225SL) and 3.70:1 gearing for improved acceleration and durability under high-torque conditions.

Upgrade the braking system with Baer 6P calipers (PN 6P.140.1000) clamping 14" two-piece rotors (PN 14.2.100.1000) at the front and Baer 4P calipers (PN 4P.120.1000) with 12" rotors (PN 12.1.100.1000) at the rear, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads (PN FDB1617) for superior fade resistance and stopping power.
estetica: Fit a custom-fabricated carbon fiber widebody kit by Anderson Composites (Shelby Cobra 289-specific, PN AC-SC289-WB) with integrated fender flares to accommodate 17x9" and 17x10.5" BBS LM wheels (PN LM-RSII-1790F/17105R) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/40ZR17 front, 315/35ZR17 rear).

Install a bespoke aluminum radiator shroud by Griffin Thermal Products (PN 2-289-ALU) with a polished finish, paired with a custom stainless steel side-exit exhaust system by Borla (PN 140407) featuring 2.5" mandrel-bent tubing and 4.5" polished tips for an aggressive yet period-correct aesthetic.

Replace the stock windscreen with a lightweight Lexan racing windshield by Vintage Racing Glass (PN VRG-289-LX) and add a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries (PN AP-289-4PT) with integrated harness bar, finished in matte black powder coat and wrapped in Alcantara for a race-ready interior.
